params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select up to X target creatures you control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Up to X target creatures you control each gain haste until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn except by creatures with haste, where X is the number of Bobbleheads you control as you activate this ability.
